# Ahmer Shah — Software Engineer & Full-Stack Developer

## About

Ahmer Shah is a Software Engineering student pursuing a dual academic path — a 4-year Bachelor's in Software Engineering at HITMS (Nov 2024 – Dec 2028) and a 3-year Advanced Diploma in Software Engineering (ADSE) from Aptech Pakistan (Aug 2025 – Sep 2028). His goal is to become a Full-Stack Developer building high-performance, future-ready web and app solutions. He leverages AI-assisted tools (GitHub Copilot, Cursor AI, ChatGPT, Claude) to streamline development workflows.

## Site

https://ahmershah.dev

## Education

- HITMS — Bachelor's in Software Engineering | Nov 2024 – Dec 2028
- Aptech Pakistan — ADSE | Aug 2025 – Sep 2028
- Superior College of Science — HSC Pre-Engineering | Jul 2022 – Jul 2024 | Grade: A (70.45%)
- St. Bonaventure High School — SSC Computer Science | Apr 2012 – Jul 2022 | Grade: A-1 (83.90%)

## Skills

- Frontend Development: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Bootstrap, Tailwind CSS, jQuery
- Backend Development: PHP, Laravel, WordPress
- Databases: MySQL
- Programming Languages: JavaScript
- Development Tools: Git, GitHub, VS Code, Vercel, Supabase, Firebase, WordPress
- AI-Assisted Tools: GitHub Copilot, Cursor AI, ChatGPT, Claude
- SEO: Advanced Search Engine Optimization
- Microsoft Office: Word, PowerPoint, Excel
- Web Technologies: JSON, XML

## Projects

### Commerza — E-Commerce Store
Full-stack e-commerce web application with storefront and admin dashboard. Includes product and order management, authentication, cart, order tracking, dynamic UI, and SEO optimization.
- Stack: HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, JavaScript, jQuery, PHP, Laravel, MySQL, SEO
- GitHub: https://github.com/ahmershahdev/commerza.git
- Live: https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/

### Novio — Online Tech Courses Platform
Frontend showcase with 30+ custom HTML pages simulating a premium online tech courses platform. Responsive layouts, interactive UI, and localStorage-based features.
- Stack: HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, JavaScript, jQuery, SEO
- GitHub: https://github.com/ahmershahdev/novio.git
- Live: https://novio.ahmershah.dev/

### Auctions Table
Single-page auction platform with live auction UI, real-time bidding simulation, smooth animations, and fully responsive design.
- Stack: HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, JavaScript, jQuery, SEO
- GitHub: https://github.com/ahmershahdev/auctions-table-onepage-frontend.git
- Live: https://auctionstable.ahmershah.dev/

### WordPress Travel Website
Travel agency system with booking system, destination guides, and travel packages.
- Stack: WordPress, PHP, CSS, SEO

### Personal 3D Portfolio
Portfolio featuring a real-time 3D background powered by Three.js with Blender GLTF models, interactive particle cursor, typewriter effect, animated orbit UI, Turn.js certificate flipbook, and advanced technical SEO.
- Stack: HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, JavaScript, Three.js, jQuery, Lenis.js, SEO
- GitHub: https://github.com/ahmershahdev/Portfolio.git
- Live: https://ahmershah.dev/
